etymology.description: ŔĘÇ(ŔĘÇ) (y├ín, "speech") + ŠĽľ(ŠĽľ) (├ío, phonetic) = spoken arrogance -> arrogant speech
etymology.interpretation: The character ŔČĚ(ŔČĚ) combines ŔĘÇ(ŔĘÇ) (y├ín, "speech") as the semantic component indicating a relation to speaking or language, with ŠĽľ(ŠĽľ) (├ío, "proud; arrogant") serving as the phonetic component. This suggests the meaning of 'arrogant speech', relating to its connection to words or expressions that may convey pride or boastfulness.
